name: Plain Yogurt

pros.title: easy to fit into familiar meals
pros.explanation: That lowers friction for regular use.

pros.title: easy protein delivery for normal diets
pros.explanation: Dairy gets real credit for convenience.

pros.title: clear calcium identity
pros.explanation: That is a core category strength.

cons.title: tolerance varies a lot person to person

cons.explanation: That is a real use-case limitation.
